description: RESP3 Protocol Implementation - Streaming parser, encoder, and Tokio codec integration

foundation.name: Foundation (Error & Types)
foundation.description: Core error handling and RESP3 type definitions with no dependencies

core_protocol.name: Core Protocol (Parser & Encoder)
core_protocol.description: Streaming state machine parser and serializer implementation

integration.name: Integration (Codec & Commands)
integration.description: Tokio codec integration and Redis command parsing

testing_validation.name: Testing & Validation
testing_validation.description: Comprehensive test suite with property tests, integration tests, and benchmarks

resp_error_types.name: Implement ProtocolError types with thiserror
resp_error_types.description: Define comprehensive protocol error types using thiserror for parsing, encoding, and command validation errors
acceptance_criteria: ProtocolError enum with 12+ variants covering all error cases
Error messages are descriptive with context (sizes, limits, commands)
Implements std::error::Error via thiserror derive macro
From implementations for std::io::Error and std::str::Utf8Error
resp_error_types.notes: Foundation for all error handling in RESP protocol

resp_value_types.name: Implement RespValue enum with all 14 RESP3 types
resp_value_types.description: Define RespValue enum covering all 14 RESP3 data types using bytes::Bytes for zero-copy efficiency
acceptance_criteria: RespValue enum with 14 variants (5 RESP2 + 9 RESP3)
All types properly model RESP3 specification
Map and Set use Vec for ordering preservation
resp_value_types.notes: Core type definitions for all RESP protocol operations

resp_value_helpers.name: Implement RespValue helper methods
resp_value_helpers.description: Add convenience methods to RespValue for common operations like null checking, type extraction, and size estimation
acceptance_criteria: is_null() returns true for all null representations
as_bytes() extracts byte data from string types
into_array() consumes and returns array elements

parser_simple_types.name: Implement parser for simple RESP types
parser_simple_types.description: Implement streaming state machine parser for simple RESP3 types that don't require length prefixes

parser_bulk_string.name: Implement parser for BulkString with length prefix
parser_bulk_string.description: Add BulkString parsing to state machine with configurable size limits and null handling
acceptance_criteria: Handles incomplete length line and data section
Returns BulkStringTooLarge error when exceeding limit
parser_bulk_string.notes: Length-prefixed string parsing with size limits

parser_array.name: Implement recursive array parser with nesting depth limits
parser_array.description: Add Array parsing with recursive element parsing and configurable depth limits

parser_resp3_types.name: Implement parser for additional RESP3 types
parser_resp3_types.description: Complete parser by adding all remaining RESP3-specific types (Double, BigNumber, Map, Set, Push, etc.)
parser_resp3_types.notes: Full RESP3 type support - Double, BigNumber, Map, Set, Push, VerbatimString, BulkError

encoder_basic.name: Implement encoder for RESP2-compatible types
encoder_basic.description: Implement RespEncoder for serializing RESP values to bytes, starting with RESP2 types

encoder_resp3.name: Implement encoder for RESP3-specific types
encoder_resp3.description: Complete encoder by adding all RESP3-specific type serialization
acceptance_criteria: Encodes Map, Set, Push with proper prefixes

inline_parser.name: Implement inline command parser for telnet compatibility
inline_parser.description: Add inline command parsing to support telnet-style commands (GET key\r\n)
acceptance_criteria: Parses multi-word commands: SET key value
Handles quoted arguments with escape sequences

tokio_codec.name: Implement Tokio Decoder/Encoder for RespCodec
tokio_codec.description: Integrate parser and encoder with Tokio's codec framework for async I/O

command_parser.name: Implement RespCommand parser for Phase 1 commands
command_parser.description: Define RespCommand enum and parser for GET, SET, DEL, EXISTS, PING commands
acceptance_criteria: RespCommand enum with 5 variants (GET, SET, DEL, EXISTS, PING)

buffer_pool.name: Implement buffer pool for efficient encoding
buffer_pool.description: Add optional buffer pool for reusing BytesMut allocations during encoding
acceptance_criteria: BufferPool struct for managing BytesMut instances
acquire() returns buffer (from pool or new)
Configurable max pool size and buffer capacity

property_tests.name: Implement property-based tests with proptest
property_tests.description: Add comprehensive property tests for fuzzing and roundtrip verification
acceptance_criteria: Arbitrary RespValue generator with depth control
Parser never panics on arbitrary input

integration_tests.name: Implement parser/encoder integration tests
integration_tests.description: Add integration tests covering complete parsing scenarios including pipelining and partial data
acceptance_criteria: Tests for pipelined commands (multiple frames in buffer)
Tests for partial data handling (incremental parsing)

codec_integration_tests.name: Implement Tokio codec integration tests
codec_integration_tests.description: Add async integration tests for Tokio codec using real TCP connections

benchmarks.name: Implement criterion benchmarks for performance validation
benchmarks.description: Add comprehensive benchmarks to verify >50K ops/sec and <100μs latency targets
acceptance_criteria: Benchmarks for parsing all RESP types
Benchmarks for encoding all RESP types
benchmarks.notes: Removed - deemed unnecessary. Property tests provide sufficient validation.
